channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zimbabwe Rejects Lithium Miners’ Request to Delay Export Ban
item.description: via Bloomberg.com #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg.com

item.title: Zimbabwe’s sole lithium salt plant unable to process third-party metal, official says @Reuters
item.description: via Reuters #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: When Zimbabweans push back: What would SA do if Beitbridge shut them out? @bulawayo24
item.description: The current "Abahambe" climate in South Africa has forced thousands of Zimbabweans to return home, many of them abruptly and under hostile conditions. But imagine, for a moment, that these same Zimbab... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Massive HIV Time Bomb as 100,000 Zimbabweans Flee South Africa in Just One Month
item.description: Harare – A looming public health crisis threatens Zimbabwe as an unprecedented exodus of its citizens from South Africa, estimated at 100,000 in a single month, strains an already fragile healthcare system. Many of these returnees, fleeing xenophobic attacks and a tightening bure via My Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Bata’s production capacity surges @bulawayo24
item.description: Footwear manufacturer Bata Shoe Company has increased production capacity utilisation from 27 percent to 42 percent and is targeting 65 percent as improved currency stability and growing demand for lo... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Zimbabwe enters global battery chemicals market @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwe has taken a significant step up the global lithium value chain with the commissioning of Africa’s first lithium sulphate processing plant, a US$400 million investment expected to create more... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: RBZ injects US$2.1 billion to support ZiG stability @bulawayo24 @ReserveBankZIM
item.description: The Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe (RBZ) has injected US$2.1 billion into the foreign exchange market since April 2024 under the Willing-Buyer Willing-Seller (WBWS) trading system, underscoring the scale of... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Zimbabwe exorbitant airlines taxes comes under spotlight @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwe is among African countries imposing high taxes and statutory charges on airlines, with the heavy cost burden threatening the long-term viability of the aviation sector, Airlines Association o... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Andy Rinomhota reveals the position he wants to play for Reading this season
item.description: Andy Rinomhota reveals his preferred position for Reading this season, explaining where he believes he can make the biggest impact. The post Andy Rinomhota reveals the position he wants to play for Reading this season appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Twin dry ports to ease Forbes Border congestion @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Twin dry ports to ease Forbes Border congestion – herald Ray Bande Senior Reporter ZIMBABWE and Mozambique have embarked on ambitious infrastructure projects to establish multi-million dollar dry ports in Mutare and Dondo respectively, in a major push to eliminate chronic via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Zimbabwe beats massive anthrax vaccination target
item.description: ZIMBABWE has surpassed its 2026 target of vac­cinating one million cattle against anthrax after im­munising over 1.02 million animals. Chief Director of... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Sub via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Murowa Diamonds placed under corporate rescue as RioZim financial crisis deepens @nehandaradio
item.description: Zimbabwe’s Murowa Diamond Mine has entered corporate rescue, freezing legal action by creditors as authorities race to stabilise one of the country’s key diamond producers. The post Murowa Diamonds placed under corporate rescue as RioZim financial crisis deepens appeared first on via Nehanda Radio #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Mutapa Gold Resources invests US$212m to supercharge Zimbabwe’s gold output @nehandaradio
item.description: Mutapa Gold Resources is investing US$212 million to dramatically increase gold production as Zimbabwe ramps up bullion output to strengthen the ZiG currency. The post Mutapa Gold Resources invests US$212m to supercharge Zimbabwe’s gold output appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Zimbabwe Reunion Plan Unravels As SA Woman Is Turned Away By Husband’s Family
item.description: Mother And Three Children Left Waiting After Moving To Zimbabwe A South African woman’s hopes of starting a new life with her husband in Zimbabwe have been dashed after his family allegedly refused to take her in. Charlotte Masemola, 34, travelled from Mpumalanga to Zimbabwe with via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
